item.title: Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Developer
item.description: Key Fundamentals To Know GCP Services Microservices The Twelve Factor App Message Buses Cloud Bigtable Best Practices

item.title: Message Buses
item.description: Use Cases Distributing workloads—distribute tasks between workers Asynchronous workflows—e.g. order fulfilment Distributing event notifications—alert other services that something has happened, e.

item.title: Microservices
item.description: Overview Loosely coupled services Each microservice communicates via API contract Highly maintainable—Test driven development, automation Independently deployable

item.title: The Twelve Factor Appp
item.description: Codebase Single codebase, many deployments One-to-one relationship between codebase and app Dependencies Explicitly declare and isolate dependencies
